name: Exact preferred-term match
logic: If practitioner preferred_term == signal preferred_term and country/context pass, allow routing.

name: Alias normalization required
logic: Resolve aliases to preferred_term before routing. This belongs in WI-PRAC-C-MATCHING.

name: Industry + capability both required
logic: Industry-only or capability-only match is partial. Full routing requires both unless signal is explicitly cross-industry.

name: Blocked terms cannot route
logic: If input matches blocked_terms, return block/review, not route.

name: Restricted terms require review
logic: If bias_status or regulated_flag is restricted/contextual/yes, require country/legal context.
